sqlMap.insert:
insert into recharge (appid, uamount, faitamount, paylogid, createtime, finishtime, rate, proof, operator, comment) values (#appId#, #uAmount#, #faitAmount#, #payLogId#, now(), #finishTime#, #rate#, #proof#, #operator#, #comment#)
select LAST_INSERT_ID() as id
sqlMap.select:
select id, appid as appId, uamount, status, faitamount, paylogid, createtime, finishtime, rate, proof from recharge where appId = #appId#
status = #status#
createTime >= #startCreateTime#
createTime <= #endCreateTime#
finishTime >= #startFinishTime#
finishTime <= #endFinishTime#
order by CreateTime desc
limit $rowIndex$,$limit$

select count(*) as totalAllNum from recharge where appId = #appId#
status = #status#
createTime >= #startCreateTime#
createTime <= #endCreateTime#
finishTime >= #startFinishTime#
finishTime <= #endFinishTime#
